risk_note.tr: Sistem diski tamamen silinir. Tum dosyalar, programlar, ayarlar kaybolur. Onceden yedek SART.
risk_note.en: System drive is wiped completely. All files, programs, settings lost. Backup is MANDATORY.

prerequisites.tr: Tum onemli dosyalarin harici diske yedegi
prerequisites.en: Backup of all important files to external drive
Windows license info (usually tied to hardware)

body.tr: Belgeler, Resimler, Videolar, Masaustu, Indirilenler, Tarayici bookmarks (export), e-posta (PST), oyun save'leri (Documents/MyGames vb.), lisans key'leri (LicenseCrawler).
body.en: Documents, Pictures, Videos, Desktop, Downloads, browser bookmarks (export), email (PST), game saves (Documents/MyGames etc.), license keys (LicenseCrawler).

body.tr: microsoft.com/software-download/windows11 > 'Create Windows 11 installation media' > USB hedef. Arac otomatik ISO indirir + bootable yapar.
body.en: microsoft.com/software-download/windows11 > 'Create Windows 11 installation media' > USB target. Auto-downloads ISO and makes bootable.

body.tr: USB takili PC'yi yeniden baslat. BIOS/UEFI'ye gir (F2/F12/Del). Boot order'da USB'yi en ust yap, kaydet, cik.
body.en: Boot PC with USB plugged. Enter BIOS/UEFI (F2/F12/Del). Put USB first in boot order, save, exit.

body.tr: Setup'ta dil/zaman secimi, lisans (lokal hesap secebilirsiniz). 'Custom: Install Windows only' > Sistem diskindeki TUM bolumleri 'Delete' > 'New' > 'Next'.
body.en: Setup: language/time, license (you can pick local account). 'Custom: Install Windows only' > 'Delete' ALL system disk partitions > 'New' > 'Next'.

body.tr: Windows Update tum guncellemeleri yukle (3-5 dk Restart). Anakart sitesinden chipset+LAN driver indir (USB ile). Sonra GPU, audio, diger driver'lar. Son adim: D-Medic yukle.
body.en: Run Windows Update for all updates (3-5 reboots). From motherboard site, install chipset+LAN drivers (via USB). Then GPU, audio, other drivers. Final: install D-Medic.
